transcription.text: has a little of the magic gone out of your life lately maybe your gray hair keeps you from looking as exciting as you still are hate that gray wash it away like magic wash years away in minutes with loving care hair color lotion by Clairol the magic of loving care is that it colors only the gray without changing your natural hair color it's gentle magic no peroxide or developer even the fragrance tells you nothing to mix just pours on right from the bottle actually leaves your hair in better condition than ever and gray is gone loving care lasts a month or more makes it so easy to keep gray away so if you hate that gray get a little of this magic for yourself you'll look so fresh feel so beautiful it makes your husband feel younger too just to look at you and that's the best magic of all try it loving care hair color lotion by Clairol the magic of loving care hair color lotion by Clairol the magic of loving care hair color lotion by Clairol
